_comment: Reference example for drill_hole. Adds a single M2 clearance hole (Ø2.4 mm) through the top face of the Base step. Coords are in mm in the part's coordinate frame; (0, 0, top-face-z) is the existing Ø10 hole's center. face_point_mm must land on a face — pick any point inside the face you want drilled. NOT idempotent: each run adds a new Hole<n> feature. Uses SimpleHole2 under the hood (see STATUS open threads re: HoleWzd).
